chapter_context.summary: Rules regarding the priests' fitness and the quality of offerings.

outline.explanation: This section focuses on Purity for Eating Holy Things (22:1-16), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Leviticus.
This section focuses on Acceptable Offerings (22:17-25), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Leviticus.

outline.text: The Motivation: I am the LORD
outline.explanation: This section focuses on The Motivation: I am the LORD (22:31-33), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Leviticus.

key_themes.title: Holiness
key_themes.description: The central call to be set apart as God is holy.

key_themes.title: Atonement
key_themes.description: The necessity of sacrifice to reconcile with God.

devotional.question: How does the detailed nature of these laws reflect God's care for every part of our lives?
In what ways do these ancient sacrifices point us toward the ultimate sacrifice of Christ?

cultural_historical.title: The Sacrificial System
cultural_historical.text: Ancient Near Eastern cultures used sacrifices, but the Levitical system was unique in its focus on moral holiness and direct covenant with one God.
